title: Unit, integration, and property tests
description:
Add unit, isolated temp-repo integration, and property tests for the engine.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] TSTA-01: unit, temp-repo integration, and property tests pass and never touch the production store.
- [ ] [hard] TSTA-02: tests cover `--force` idempotence, update-not-duplicate refresh, the JSON apply-result output, explicit anchor binding, attached gate presets, acyclicity, transitive reduction, and the pre-apply snapshot transform — all in isolated repositories.
